zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Barney於1400年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，她的父親John Berney38歲，母親Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham39歲。她於大約1416年與Peter Lyhart de Nauton在英國英格蘭諾福爾可利德哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1446年享年46歲，埋葬在英國越可爾洛瑟哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Barney于1400年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，她的父亲John Berney38岁，母亲Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham39岁。她于大约1416年与Peter Lyhart de Nauton在英国英格兰諾福爾可利德哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1446年享年46岁，埋葬在英国越可爾洛瑟哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Barney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Barney in Norfolk, which is probably named with an Old English personal name Bera (with genitive -n) + Old English ēg ‘island, dry ground in a marsh’.
English: from the personal name Barney, a pet form of Bernard .
Scottish: possibly from the Old Norse personal name Bjarni (from bjǫrn ‘bear’).

variants.name: Burney
meanings: English (northern, of Norman origin): habitational name from Bernay in Eure, France, named with a Gaulish personal name Brenno + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish (Antrim) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’, a Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Bjarni (from björn ‘bear cub, warrior’).

variants.name: Bernier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Normand, Andre, Fernand, Armand, Adrien, Michel, Camille, Jacques, Lucien, Benoit, Laurent.
French: from the personal name Bernier, composed of the ancient Germanic elements bern ‘bear’ + hari ‘army’. Compare Barney and Barnier .
North German: habitational name from a place so named in Mecklenburg.

variants.name: Bernard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Andre, Lucien, Normand, Henri, Michel, Cecile, Gabrielle.

English, Scottish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, German, Polish, Czech, Slovenian, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and African (mainly Tanzania): from the personal name Bernard, from an ancient Germanic name, composed of the elements ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’ (see Bernhard ). It was borne by several Christian saints, including Saint Bernard of Menthon (923–1008), founder of Alpine hospices and patron saint of mountaineers, whose cult accounts for the frequency of the name in Alpine regions. The popularity of the personal name was also greatly increased by virtue of its having been borne by Saint Bernard of Clairvaux (c. 1090–1153), founder and abbot of the Cistercian monastery at Clairvaux. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Bernardo . Bernard is the second most frequent surname in France. Compare Barnard , Benore , and Burnor .

History: The first documented bearer of this name in Canada was from the Lorraine region of France. He is recorded in Quebec City, QC, in 1666 as Jean Bernard. He and some of his descendants were dit Anse or Hanse, presumably because his original forename was Hans (German equivalent of French Jean). — The Bernard families of LA have origins in France, Acadia, the West Indies, and Germany. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Barney was born in 1400, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Berney, was 38 and her mother, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, was 39. She married Peter Lyhart de Nauton about 1416, in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1446, at the age of 46, and was buried in Rotherham, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Barney est née en 1400, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Berney, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Peter Lyhart de Nauton environ 1416, à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1446, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Rotherham, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Barney 1400 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Berney 38 und ihre Mutter Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham 39. Sie hat um 1416 in Reedham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Peter Lyhart de Nauton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1446 im Alter von 46 Jahren und wurde in Rotherham, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Barney è nata il nel 1400 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Berney, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Peter Lyhart de Nauton circa 1416, nel Reedham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1446, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Rotherham, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Barneyが1400年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父John Berneyは38歳，母Isabel Elizabeth Heveninghamは39歳であった。約1416年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムでPeter Lyhart de Nautonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1446年に46歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアロスエルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Barney(이)가 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Berney(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리드함에서 Peter Lyhart de Nauton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1446년 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 로더함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Barney nasceu em 1400, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Berney, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter Lyhart de Nauton aproximadamente 1416, em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1446, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Rotherham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Barney родилась в 1400 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Berney было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Lyhart de Nauton около 1416 г. в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1446 г. в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности ротирам, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Barney nació en 1400, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Berney, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Peter Lyhart de Nauton aproximadamente 1416, en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1446, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Rotherham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
